text:
International Tennis Federation, governing body of international tennis, also known as ITF. Attributes include: 
- inception: "1 Mar 1912"
- headquarters location: "London"
- sport: "tennis"
- Commons category: "International Tennis Federation"
- main Wikidata property: "ITF player ID before 2020 (archived)",
 "ITF wheelchair player ID until 2019 (archived)",
 "ITF tournament ID",
 "ITF player ID since 2020"
- short name: "ITF"
- social media followers: "+57100 (point in time: 8 Feb 2023)",
 "+134000 (point in time: 18 Oct 2025)"
- member of: "Association of Summer Olympic International Federations"
- operating area: "Earth"
- country: "United Kingdom"
